name: TaxJar API
what_it_does: Sales tax automation API for US-based e-commerce. Calculates real-time sales tax rates, manages nexus, automates filing, and handles exemptions. Simpler and more affordable than Avalara for mid-market.
use_cases: Real-time US sales tax calculation for e-commerce checkout
Automated sales tax filing in states where nexus exists
Nexus determination for physical and economic nexus
Exemption certificate validation for B2B transactions
not_for: International VAT outside the US (limited international support)
Enterprise-scale businesses needing global tax coverage (use Avalara)
Non-US tax jurisdictions as primary use case
Income tax or payroll tax calculations
best_when: An agent needs straightforward US sales tax calculation and filing automation for an e-commerce business with multi-state nexus, at a more accessible price point than Avalara.
avoid_when: You need global VAT compliance or enterprise-scale international tax coverage.

auth.notes: Simple API token passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. No OAuth required. Token visible in TaxJar dashboard. Very simple for agent integration — no OAuth flow needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free sandbox for testing; no free production tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $19/month (US only, 1 state), Professional custom pricing for multi-state and filing
pricing.notes: Transparent pricing tiers unlike Avalara. Starter plan is affordable. AutoFile add-on required for automated returns. Volume discounts available. More accessible for mid-market vs Avalara.

performance.rate_limits: 10,000 API calls/month on Starter, higher on Professional

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear JSON error responses with status code, error type, and message. Documentation is accurate and well-maintained. Error messages are developer-friendly.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Transactions can be created with a transaction_id that must be unique. Duplicate transaction_id returns an error rather than silently duplicating. Agents should use order IDs as transaction IDs.
known_agent_gotchas: Monthly API call limits apply — agents must monitor usage to avoid overages
Sandbox and production use different API tokens and environments
Transaction creation required for AutoFile to work — must push orders, not just calculate
Nexus must be manually configured in TaxJar dashboard before calculations are accurate
Product tax categories (TaxJar product categories) must be set for accurate rates
Rate lookups don't include filing — separate AutoFile subscription required
